questions.question: What happens when a child component tries to mutate a prop directly?
options: The parent state is updated correctly
Vue triggers a runtime warning: Attempting to mutate prop

questions.question: Which API is used to declare local reactive state owned by the component?
What is the correct pattern when a child needs to change a value owned by the parent?
options: Use toRef() to create a writable ref from the prop
Mutate the prop — Vue 3 allows it with a warning suppression
Emit an event from the child; the parent updates its own state
Use a Pinia store as an intermediary for all prop changes
